prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that explains a product rollout with charts about dog shampoo
title: an interactive HTML artifact that explains a product rollout with charts

artifactBrief.jobToBeDone: understand the progress and impact of a dog shampoo product rollout
artifactBrief.artifactThesis: interactive visualization of key metrics during a product launch
requiredInteractions: filter by date range to update the visible chart and detail panel
hover for details to reveal shared detail in the visible detail panel
factualAnchors: Q1 sales figures for dog shampoos
customer feedback on new product features

candidateSummaries.summary: Interactive Visualization of Key Metrics During a Product Launch

judge.rationale: Candidate fully meets the request with interactive controls and relevant content.
